[cron:0b3d3971-d83f-4c07-a590-e09a79f55291 ghl-control-loop-orchestrator-60m] L2.5 CONTROL LOOP ORCHESTRATOR: Inspect GHL lifecycle state across new leads, pipeline progression, stalled contacts, cart status, and post-purchase fulfillment signals. Low-risk auto actions allowed: tags, tasks, evidence-based stage moves. LIMITED OUTBOUND ENABLED: may send consent-safe follow-up SMS/email only to contacts with prior opt-in and recent intent signals, max 1 message/contact per 24h and max 20 total sends/run. Never send to do-not-contact, unsubscribed, or complaint-flagged contacts. Do NOT use manipulative urgency. Do NOT charge, invoice, or modify payment objects. If opt-out/complaint spikes or threshold breach detected, auto-pause outbound recommendations and return urgent alert with rollback steps. Return concise summary of actions/sends only when changes are made; else blank.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 18:26 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-21 23:26 UTC

arguments.command:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$token = $env:GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN
if (-not $token) { Write-Output 'NO_TOKEN'; exit 0 }
$base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com'
$headers=@{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; Version='2021-07-28'; Accept='application/json' }
# Pull recent contacts and opportunities
$contacts = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri "$base/contacts/?limit=100" -Headers $headers
$opps = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Get -Uri "$base/opportunities/?limit=100" -Headers $headers
# Output compact stats
$cList = @($contacts.contacts)
$oList = @($opps.opportunities)
$now = Get-Date
$stalled = $oList | Where-Object { $_.status -eq 'open' -and $_.lastStatusChangeAt -and ((New-TimeSpan -Start ([DateTimeOffset]::FromUnixTimeMilliseconds([int64]$_.lastStatusChangeAt).DateTime) -End $now).TotalDays -ge 7) }
$summary = [pscustomobject]@{
  contacts = $cList.Count
  opportunities = $oList.Count
  stalledOpenOpps = @($stalled).Count
}
$summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6

$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$token=$env:GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN
$base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com'
$loc='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'
$headers=@{ Authorization = "Bearer $token"; Version='2021-07-28'; Accept='application/json'; 'Content-Type'='application/json' }
$opps=(Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "$base/opportunities/search" -Headers $headers -Body (@{locationId=$loc;limit=100}|ConvertTo-Json)).opportunities
$o=$opps | Where-Object { $_.contact.tags -contains 'ebook-buyer' -and $_.pipelineId -eq 'WwwiXO65toZOTQptzmWp' -and $_.pipelineStageId -ne 'f6101dbb-4a62-4d27-a93b-9cb05010abf9' } | Select-Object -First 1
if(-not $o){''; exit 0}
$body=@{ pipelineStageId='f6101dbb-4a62-4d27-a93b-9cb05010abf9' } | ConvertTo-Json
$r=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Put -Uri "$base/opportunities/$($o.id)" -Headers $headers -Body $body
[pscustomobject]@{updated=$o.id; from=$o.pipelineStageId; to='f6101dbb-4a62-4d27-a93b-9cb05010abf9'} | ConvertTo-Json
